summary: R2 Refactor testing completed successfully. All features are working correctly: login, predios listing, Nuevo Predio form with R2 refactor (separate Zonas de Terreno and Construcciones sections), Propietario R1 tab with separated name fields, Excel export, and edit predio modal.
critical_code_review_comments: React Hook useEffect warnings in multiple components - missing dependencies in dependency arrays (non-blocking but should be addressed for code quality)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing migrated data (165,362 predios)
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 refactor is complete and working. The Nuevo Predio form has 3 tabs: 'Código Nacional (30 dígitos)', 'Propietario (R1)', and 'Físico (R2)'. The Físico (R2) tab has two separate sections: 'Zonas de Terreno' (with Agregar Zona button) and 'Construcciones' (with Agregar Construcción button, IDs A, B, C...). Subtotals are calculated automatically. The Propietario (R1) tab has separated name fields (primer_apellido, segundo_apellido, primer_nombre, segundo_nombre). Excel export works correctly with R1/R2 format. Edit predio modal works correctly.

features_tested.navigation_to_predios: PASSED - Gestión de Predios page loads with municipio cards
features_tested.fisico_r2_tab: PASSED - Shows separate Zonas de Terreno and Construcciones sections
features_tested.agregar_construccion_button: PASSED - Adds new constructions with correct IDs (A, B, C)
features_tested.propietario_r1_tab: PASSED - Shows separated name fields (primer_apellido, segundo_apellido, primer_nombre, segundo_nombre)
features_tested.excel_export: PASSED - Excel exported successfully with 2,188 predios
features_tested.edit_predio_modal: PASSED - Edit modal opens and shows predio data correctly
